title: More information for the SDK's listen function

posts.author: eduardo_worktables (Eduardo Oliveira)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I’m a monday.com app developer and I’ve been creating solutions for monday.com users for a bit now. In my current journey of developing an app to help monday.com users, I’ve stumbled in a difficulty, when I’m using the listen function present in the monday-sdk-js library, more precisely the listen("itemIds") function (see more details here). Currently, this function only returns the IDs of the items that pass the view’s filters, but this information could be more complete if, instead of only returning the item IDs, also returned the item’s board ID. That would help a lot to do pre-processing, such as grouping the item IDs by board.

I think this change would not be a big problem to implement, but it would definitely help the developers a lot.

Thanks in advance.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you @eduardo_worktables for the request!

Everyone: You can vote for this feature at the top of the screen

Cheers,
Matias
